proposal.hypothesis: The first two hard-case Policies improved score but crossed reset and motion-quality gates; a micro residual with explicit saturation/impact costs should retain the push correction inside the prior's safe neighborhood.
proposal.expectedEffect: Recover strong-push survival without losing reset survival, delayed recovery, saturation, or impact gates.

gateReasons: spatial-generalization: delay-20ms: lateral-drift regressed from passing to failing
spatial-generalization: delay-60ms: forward-progress regressed from passing to failing
spatial-generalization: delay-plus-reset: forward-progress regressed from passing to failing
motion-quality: delayed-forward: forward-progress regressed from passing to failing
motion-quality: delayed-forward: signed-forward-progress regressed from passing to failing
motion-quality: delayed-forward: actuator-saturation regressed from passing to failing
motion-quality: delayed-forward: foot-impact regressed from passing to failing
